_comment: BLOCKER (Forseti-format-pending): NCIC_ID, LEID, HART_CASE_ID, HART_SUBJECT_ID patterns are TODO placeholders — they match NOTHING in production. Real CJIS compliance requires these formats from Forseti. Until supplied: the gate catches SSN/PHONE/EMAIL/DOB/NAME_NARRATIVE/ADDRESS but is BLIND to NCIC numbers, LEIDs, and HART case/subject IDs. Security-engineer MUST note this limitation in every phase-8 report. Action: file a Forseti request, add real regex formats, and remove this BLOCKER comment.

allowlist.description: Keel project author domain — strip before scanning to allow marketplace display
matellio.com project domain — strip before scanning
GHA uses-directive CI version pins are not PII
npm scoped package ref with embedded slash is not PII
Semver version pins (pkg at v1.2.3 or at-latest tag) are not PII — digit-only version string is not a domain
RFC 2606 reserved documentation domains (example.com/org/net/edu) never contain real PII
.local TLD is non-routable per RFC 6762 — used for test fixtures and dev infrastructure only
npm glob-package deprecated-notice — a maintainer reference that appears in package-lock.json, not CJIS data
